case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS ARIAN AUTOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $260.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT ARIAN AUTOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARIAN AUTOS $260.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY PROCEEDING FILED BY DEF'S. ATTORNEY.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $97.50 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ARIAN AUTOS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ARIAN AUTOS
